common.pleaseRefresh: Please refresh the page and try again.

landing.title: Find yourself in every wedding photo
landing.lead: Guests upload a selfie and instantly find every wedding photo they appear in — no scrolling through hundreds of shots.
landing.hintSignedIn: Use the tabs below to open your studio, gallery, or admin tools.
landing.hintSignedOut: Try the demo, request a gallery, or explore Snapic Studio for photographers.

forPhotographers.title: Delight every guest with AI photo matching
forPhotographers.lead: Upload once from your studio dashboard. Your clients' guests find themselves in every photo — no scrolling through hundreds of shots.
forPhotographers.stepsTitle: From upload to wow in three steps
forPhotographers.pricingTitle: Pricing that scales with your studio
forPhotographers.pricingLead: Start with a single event or commit to a season — upgrade anytime as your volume grows.
forPhotographers.ctaTitle: Ready to give guests a better experience?
forPhotographers.ctaLead: Set up your studio in minutes and run your first gallery on your next wedding.

uploadOnce.title: Upload once
uploadOnce.description: You deliver the album; guests find themselves without endless scrolling.

realTime.title: Real-time matching
realTime.description: Photos stream in as they're found — the same experience guests get on event day.

branded.title: Studio-branded
branded.description: Your logo, colors, and guest link keep the experience feeling like yours.

create.title: Create a client gallery
create.description: Add the couple, set branding, and choose whether they co-manage the album or you run it solo.

upload.title: Upload & index faces
upload.description: Drop in the wedding album from your studio dashboard. Snapic indexes every face in the background.

share.title: Share the guest link
share.description: Send a link or QR code. Guests upload a selfie and watch their photos appear in real time.

perEvent.name: Pay per event
perEvent.detail: One wedding, one gallery. Perfect for trying Snapic with your next client.

annual.name: Annual bundle
annual.detail: Lock in volume pricing for a busy season and keep every client gallery under one studio.

unlimited.name: Unlimited
unlimited.detail: For high-volume studios running guest matching across dozens of events every year.

requestAccess.title: Request your wedding gallery
requestAccess.lead: Ask for a private Snapic gallery for your wedding. We'll review your details and email you when your event is ready for guests.
requestAccess.panelLead: All fields marked required help us set up your gallery faster.
requestAccess.messagePlaceholder: Photographer name, venue, or anything else we should know…
requestAccess.successLead: Thanks{{namePart}}! We'll review your request and email {{email}} when your wedding gallery is ready.

private.title: Private gallery for your wedding
private.description: A dedicated space where you and your guests can find every photo from your day.

instant.title: Guests find themselves instantly
instant.description: Upload a selfie once — Snapic matches you across the full album in seconds.

setup.title: We handle the setup
setup.description: Tell us a few details and we'll reach out when your gallery is ready to go live.

nextSteps.review: We review your request within a couple of business days.
nextSteps.email: You'll get an email when your private gallery is ready.
nextSteps.share: Share the guest link so friends and family can find their photos.

auth.loginLead: Use Google or a magic link sent to your email.
auth.magicLinkSent: Check your email for a sign-in link.
auth.supabaseNotConfigured: Authentication is not configured for this deployment.
auth.studioSignupLeadSignedOut: Sign in to register your photography studio on Snapic.
auth.studioSignupLeadSignedIn: This name appears on guest galleries and your studio dashboard. You can change it later in settings.
auth.studioSelectLead: Pick which studio to manage, or respond to pending invitations below.

demo.demoLimitError: Demo albums are limited to {{max}} photos.
demo.demoLimitIntro: Demo albums are limited to {{max}} photos.
demo.useFindMyPhotos: use Find my photos in the sidebar

team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Invite associates to help manage client galleries.
team.pendingHint: Waiting for teammates to accept from their Snapic account.
team.noMembers: No team members yet. Invite someone below.
team.alreadyMember: This person is already on your team.
team.invitePending: An invitation is already pending for this email.
team.registeredHint: They'll get an email and can accept the invitation from their studio dashboard.

clients.title: Clients
clients.deleteConfirm_one: Delete "{{title}}" permanently? Photos, searches, and gallery data will be removed. This cannot be undone.
clients.deleteConfirm_other: Delete {{count}} clients permanently? Photos, searches, and gallery data will be removed. This cannot be undone.

settings.title: Studio settings
settings.requireCoupleGoLiveOn: Couples must approve before the gallery goes live.
settings.requireCoupleGoLiveOff: You can go live without waiting for couple approval.
settings.associateScopeOn: Associates can access every client gallery in your studio.
settings.associateScopeOff: Associates only see events they're assigned to.
settings.associateScopeWarning: Associates lose access to all galleries until you assign them on each client’s Details tab.
settings.logoHint: Shown on guest gallery pages. JPEG, PNG, or WebP up to 10 MB.

billing.title: Billing
billing.portalUnavailable: Manage billing becomes available after your first purchase.

signup.title: Create your studio
signup.leadSignedOut: Sign in to register your photography studio on Snapic.
signup.leadSignedIn: This name appears on guest galleries and your studio dashboard. You can change it later in settings.

select.title: Choose a studio
select.lead: Pick which studio to manage, or respond to pending invitations below.

handoff.title: Go live or hand off
handoff.detail: Publish or invite the couple to review.

clientDetail.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{title}}" permanently? Photos, searches, and gallery data will be removed. This cannot be undone.

albumManager.title: Wedding album
albumManager.note: Upload photos, organize sections, and index faces using the full album tools.

details.closeHint: Guests will no longer be able to search. You can still manage photos.
details.closeConfirm: Close "{{title}}" for guests? They will see an ended message.

assignees.title: Team access
assignees.hint: Choose which associates can work on this gallery.
assignees.noAssociates: Invite associates from the Team page first.

guest.notFoundLead: This link may be incorrect or the event is not public yet.
guest.closedDetail: Photo matching is no longer available. Thank you for celebrating with us.
guest.photosComingSoonDetail: The album is still being uploaded. Check back in a few minutes — the photographer is adding photos now.
guest.preparingPhotos_one: We're preparing {{count}} photo for face search — this usually takes a few minutes after upload.
guest.preparingPhotos_other: We're preparing {{count}} photos for face search — this usually takes a few minutes after upload.
guest.indexingAlbum: We're indexing the album for face search. This usually takes a few minutes.
guest.preparingAlbum: We're preparing the album for face search. This usually takes a few minutes after upload.
guest.albumNotReady: The wedding album is still being prepared for search. Please check back in a few minutes.
guest.albumNotReadyRetry: The wedding album is still being prepared for search. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
guest.rateLimited: You've reached the search limit for this hour. Please wait about an hour before trying again.
guest.uploadSelfieDesc: Upload a clear selfie to search {{count}} wedding photos.
guest.offlineBanner: You're offline. Reconnect to search or download photos.
guest.slowConnectionBanner: Slow connection detected — searching may take a little longer.
guest.stillSearchingBanner: Still searching a large album. Matches will keep appearing as we find them.
guest.newPhotosBanner_one: {{count}} new photo was added since your last search. Search again to find more.
guest.newPhotosBanner_other: {{count}} new photos were added since your last search. Search again to find more.
guest.newPhotosBannerGeneric: New photos were added since your last search. Search again to find more.
guest.tip1: Use a well-lit photo with your face clearly visible
guest.tip2: Look straight at the camera, without sunglasses or a mask
guest.tip3: Try a different selfie if this one was blurry or far away
guest.saveResults: Save these results to your account
guest.privacy: Your selfie is processed in memory and never stored.

manage.title: Manage event
manage.noPermission: You do not have permission to manage this event.
manage.setupReturnHint: Return here after uploading — your checklist will update automatically.
manage.setupBannerLead: Complete branding and review your launch checklist.
manage.photographerUploadHint: Your photographer manages album uploads. You can remove individual photos if needed.
manage.removePhotoConfirm: Remove this photo from the album?
manage.guestLinkHint: Share this link or QR code with wedding guests at the venue.
manage.inviteCoAdminHint: We will email them a sign-in link. After they join, they can manage this event.
manage.inviteSent: Invite sent — they will receive an email to join as admin.
manage.autoIndexed_one: Indexed {{count}} new photo automatically after upload.
manage.autoIndexed_other: Indexed {{count}} new photos automatically after upload.

setup.title: Event setup
setup.loadFailed: This event could not be loaded.
setup.noPermission: You do not have permission to set up this event.
setup.welcomeLeadPhotographer: Your photographer has prepared your gallery. Personalize branding and go live when you're ready.
setup.welcomeLeadSelf: We'll walk you through branding your guest page, inviting your partner, and getting ready to share your album.
setup.bulletPersonalize: Personalize how guests see your event
setup.bulletInvitePartner: Optionally invite your partner as co-admin
setup.bulletUploadSelf: Upload photos and go live when you're ready
setup.bulletReviewPhotographer: Review your gallery and go live when you're ready
setup.brandingLead: These details appear on your guest page and printable QR cards.
setup.accentHint: Used on buttons, links, and guest page accents
setup.inviteLead: Optional — send a co-admin invite so they can upload photos and manage settings too.
setup.inviteSent: Invite sent — they'll get an email to join.
setup.readyLead: Complete each step below to get your gallery ready for wedding guests.
setup.checklistIndexedFailed: Faces indexed ({{count}} failed — retry from album tab)
setup.checklistActivate: Set event to Active when ready
setup.readyHintComplete: Your gallery is ready for guests. Finish setup to hide this wizard.
setup.readyHintProgress: Return here after each step — the next action will update automatically.
setup.indexReadyNotice: {{result}} Your album is ready to go live.
setup.indexNoPhotos: No photos were indexed. Some images may be corrupted or missing faces — try re-uploading them.
setup.indexFailed: Face indexing failed. Wait a moment and try again, or upload clearer photos.

live.title: Launch summary
live.loadFailed: This event could not be loaded.
live.headline: You're live!
live.lead: {{coupleNames}} is ready for guests. Share the link or QR code at the venue.

tips.printQr: Print the QR card for tables or the entrance
tips.selfieSearch: Guests upload a selfie and get every photo they appear in
tips.uploadMore: You can upload more photos anytime from your dashboard

live.statusNote: Your event is still in {{status}} status. Set it to Active in Settings so guests can search.

share.title: Wedding moments
share.desc: Photos shared from a Snapic search

admin.title: Dashboard
admin.loadPartialFailed: Some dashboard sections failed to load. Try refreshing the page.

events.title: Events

attention.emptyAlbum: Showing active events with no photos
attention.unindexed: Showing events with photos needing face index
attention.archiveDue: Showing events past their archive date

events.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{title}}" permanently? Photos, searches, and storage will be removed.

signupRequests.title: Signup requests
signupRequests.gridHintDesktop: Click a card to review. Hover for details.
signupRequests.gridHintMobile: Tap a card for details, then tap Review.
signupRequests.approveSuccessEmail: Request approved and welcome email sent.
signupRequests.approveSuccessEmailFailed: Request approved. Supabase invite sent, but the Snapic welcome email could not be sent — check RESEND_API_KEY and SNAPIC_FROM_EMAIL on Render.
signupRequests.rejectSuccessEmail: Request rejected and notification email sent.
signupRequests.rejectSuccessEmailFailed: Request rejected. The rejection email could not be sent — set RESEND_API_KEY on Render and use a verified SNAPIC_FROM_EMAIL (Resend sandbox only delivers to your account email).

attention.allClear: All clear — nothing needs your attention right now.
attention.title: Needs attention

liveFeed.title: Live activity
liveFeed.liveTitle: Dashboard updates automatically when signups, searches, or admin actions occur.
liveFeed.emptyLive: Watching for new signup requests, guest searches, and admin actions…
liveFeed.emptyOffline: Realtime updates unavailable — refresh the page to see the latest data.

sidebar.sensitivityHint: Lower = more photos found, higher = stricter matching.

galleryInput.intro: Add the wedding album, photographer's gallery, or shared folder photos. We'll search through every image to find the ones you're in.
galleryInput.demoLimitSuffix: Demo albums are limited to {{max}} photos.
galleryInput.urlsHint: One URL per line — great for shared albums

selfieUpload.intro: Share a clear photo of your face so we can find every picture of you from the celebration.
selfieUpload.coupleModeSuffix: In couple mode, we search for either partner.
selfieUpload.privacy: Your portraits are used only for this search and are not stored on our servers. Shared result links expire after 7 days.
selfieUpload.cameraError: Could not access the camera. Upload a photo instead.
selfieUpload.tip: Tip: face the camera with good lighting — just like a wedding portrait.

resultsGrid.progressHintGuest: This can take a moment for large albums — matches appear as we find them
resultsGrid.progressHintDemo: Looking for your face in every photo
resultsGrid.emptyDesc: Once you've added your portrait and gallery photos, tap Find my photos in the sidebar to discover every picture you appear in.
resultsGrid.noMatchesGuest: We couldn't find you in the album yet. Try a clearer, well-lit selfie facing the camera.
resultsGrid.noMatchesDemo: We couldn't find matching photos. Try adjusting sensitivity in the sidebar, or add clearer gallery images.
resultsGrid.noFilterGuest: No photos match this filter. Try another tab above.
resultsGrid.noFilterDemo: No photos match this filter. Try another tab or lower the sensitivity.

installPrompt.title: Add Snapic to your home screen
installPrompt.desc: Open Snapic like an app — full screen, one tap from your phone.
installPrompt.iosStep1: Tap the Share button ↑ at the bottom of Safari
installPrompt.iosStep2: Scroll and tap Add to Home Screen
installPrompt.iosStep3: Tap Add in the top corner
installPrompt.androidStep2: Tap Install app or Add to Home screen
installPrompt.iosNote: On iPhone, this button shows you the exact Safari steps.

albumUpload.dropTitle: Drop photos or a folder here
albumUpload.mobileHint: On iPhone, add about {{batch}} photos at a time for fastest selection. You can tap Add photos again while uploads continue.
albumUpload.desktopHint: Drag a folder from your computer, or choose a folder — best for large albums from your photographer.
albumUpload.hintSuffix: Duplicates are skipped by filename; identical files are caught on the server. You can add more photos while uploads continue — return to this tab if uploads pause on iPhone.
albumUpload.allDuplicates: All {{count}} selected photo(s) are already in the album or queue.
albumUpload.queueConfirm: You already have many photos queued. For best results on iPhone, wait for the current batch to finish or add smaller groups. Add more anyway?
albumUpload.preparingHint: Your phone is loading the selected images — this can take a minute for large batches.
albumUpload.paused: Upload paused — return to this tab to continue
albumUpload.keepOpen: Keep this page open for fastest uploads. You can tap Add photos to queue another batch while these upload.
albumUpload.iphonePause: On iPhone, Safari pauses uploads when you leave the app. Open Snapic again to continue — nothing is lost.
albumUpload.completeFailed: {{count}} failed — try again or check your connection.

albumGrid.empty: No photos yet. Upload your wedding album above.
albumGrid.previewWarn: Some previews could not be loaded. Refresh the page after the API redeploys.
albumGrid.bulkDeleteConfirm_one: Remove {{count}} photo from the album? This cannot be undone.
albumGrid.bulkDeleteConfirm_other: Remove {{count}} photos from the album? This cannot be undone.

albumStatus.title: Album status
albumStatus.uploadingDetail: Face indexing will start automatically when uploads finish.
albumStatus.failedDetail_one: {{count}} photo failed indexing and won't appear in search
albumStatus.failedDetail_other: {{count}} photos failed indexing and won't appear in search
albumStatus.readyDetail: {{count}} photos indexed — guests can find themselves now

guestQr.label: Guest link QR code
guestQr.hint: Print the card and place it at tables or the entrance so guests can scan easily.
guestQr.printHeading: Scan to find your wedding photos

printSteps.1: 1. Open your camera and scan the code
printSteps.2: 2. Upload a clear selfie of your face

slugInput.tooShort: Slug must be at least {{min}} characters.
